title: WOW Tasty Bites
summary: Food-focused campaign visuals balancing appetite appeal, brand tone and clear messaging.
thumbnail_alt: WOW Tasty Bites food campaign creative
outcome: Creatives that made the products feel fresh and confident while keeping brand tone consistent across the feed.

seo.title: WOW Tasty Bites — Food Social Campaign | Shubham Pendse
seo.description: Food-focused campaign creatives for WOW Tasty Bites, balancing appetite appeal and brand tone.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: The brand needed campaign creatives that felt appetising without becoming loud. Every post had to earn attention in a busy food category while staying grounded in the brand voice.

sections.heading: Approach
sections.body: I focused on strong product framing, warm restrained colour and clean typography — enough energy to stop the scroll, enough discipline to stay on-brand.
